parameters.query: SELECT id, name, email, phone, unsubscribed_email, unsubscribed_sms FROM contacts WHERE (email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' AND unsubscribed_email = false) OR (phone IS NOT NULL AND phone != '' AND unsubscribed_sms = false)
